response.justification: Bogdan has strong general software engineering experience and has worked with JVM languages (Java, C#) and multiple ecosystems, but lacks direct experience with enterprise IDE tooling, JVM internals, or Spring/Kotlin development at depth. His background in developer tooling (e.g., MCP, CI/CD) and system-level work is relevant, but his resume does not highlight IDE-specific contributions or deep JVM expertise.
strengths: Extensive experience with Java and C# (JVM-related languages)
Strong background in developer tooling and system-level programming (e.g., MCP, CI/CD, low-latency apps)
Proven ability to ship complex systems and collaborate on large codebases
concerns: No explicit experience with enterprise IDEs, JVM tooling, or language server protocols
Limited direct experience with Spring, Kotlin, or enterprise frameworks in a tooling context
Resume lacks details on IDE internals or JVM optimization work
